newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Sensirion continued routine product cadence (SCD43 CO2 sensor, SEN62 environmental platform, SHT40/41 humidity/temp sensors) and reiterated mid-term guidance with FX headwinds noted; none of these are new since June 9 and none change guidance. No new design win disclosed.

verdicts.rankRationale: High-conviction sensors-as-measurement-layer thesis unchanged since June 8. Product cadence (CO2/humidity/HVAC sensors) is routine, not new design wins; mid-term guide reiterated. +2.4% drift is flow. No new evidence strengthens the cooling/HVAC/edge-AI measurement case; hold at #10.
verdicts.bull: Measurement layer for cooling, HVAC, robotics and edge AI; quality niche sensor franchise with A2L/HVAC and medical/auto design-win pipeline.
verdicts.neutral: Quality compounder, but no fresh catalyst; FX headwinds dampen reported growth.
verdicts.bear: 33% YTD rerating prices much of the quality; small ($1.7B) and cyclically exposed to industrial sensing.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New HVAC/medical/auto design win or H1 results
verdicts.primaryRisk: FX drag and industrial/auto sensing demand softness

verdicts.rankRationale: On the test-time-scaling lens Sensirion is a thermal/industrial-control sensor proxy, a tangential fit. No news since June 8 hold; product launches are routine. Nothing changes the scaling-relevance of its sensing portfolio; hold at #24.
verdicts.bull: Sensors for thermal/industrial control feed datacenter and HVAC monitoring buildout.
verdicts.neutral: Peripheral to the core scaling thesis; scientific-instruments bucket.
verdicts.bear: Only indirectly levered to compute scaling; lower-conviction fit than core names.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Tangential to AI scaling; industrial cyclicality
